chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 782 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objections No.25 & 26. 2. For hearing of main case. 3. For hearing of CMA No.3480/2024. 18.08.2025 Agha Shahid Majeed Khan, advocate for the applicant. Mr. Muhammad Bilal, advocate for the respondent. It is contention of the learned counsel for the applicant that the impugned judgment dated 16.08.2024 rendered by the Customs Appellate Tribunal at Karachi is dissonant with the law. The issue agitated is that while the entire record demonstrates the consignment to be of natural leather shoes and the same has been misconstrued as artificial leather shoes while placing reliance on the very record. Learned counsel for the respondent states that it may be just and proper for the impugned judgment to be set aside and the matter be remanded back to the learned Appellate Tribunal for adjudication afresh in accordance with law. In view hereof, by consent, the impugned judgment is set aside and the matter is remanded back for fresh adjudication. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
